hook.headline: the thing we've been quietly building ships in 24 hours.

cards.label: 01 · why
cards.title: Because manual DMs don't scale.
cards.body: Every creator we talked to had the same problem: people comment on a post asking for a link, but only 20% ever get a DM back. The other 80% silently churn.
cards.metric: → 80% of warm interest is being lost

cards.label: 02 · what
cards.title: Built it. Quietly.
cards.body: We've been shipping it in the background for the last 8 weeks while you watched the dev-tool carousels go out. It's ready. Tomorrow you get to see it.

cards.label: 03 · who
cards.title: Built by creators, for creators.
cards.body: Not enterprise. Not for big agencies. Built for the solo creator and small team who lives in their DMs and watches comments stack up faster than they can reply.

cards.label: 04 · when
cards.title: 01 · 07 · 2026 · 09:30 IST.
cards.body: Same time, tomorrow. The reveal post drops here. No email list, no waitlist, no "join the beta" friction. Just open this profile tomorrow morning.

cards.label: 05 · hint
cards.title: One word: automation.
cards.body: If you've ever wished your Instagram DMs could reply themselves to the easy stuff — so you could focus on the actual conversations — you're going to want this.

take.use_if: You're a creator who gets more DMs than they can reply to and you've started losing warm leads.
take.skip_if: You're not on Instagram in any serious way — this won't be for you.
